subcodes.first_line: O concourse of nations! The Most Great Name hath come, calling you unto the Supreme Horizon. Fear ye the Lord of created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا معشر الامم قد اتی الاسم الاعظم و یدعوکم الی الافق الاعلی اتقوا مولی الوری
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @proclamation to the people of the world, @consolation and comfort, @personal instructions, @chastisement and requital, @Greatest Name, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
